introduction:
The Alien Hives are a faction of aliens using biotechnology, made up of
a variety of subspecies which come from the remote frontiers of the
galaxy, hoping to recreate the Mother that shaped them.
When they first arrived, they were viewed as monstrous invaders, but
after a long war of extermination, breakthroughs in communication
led to a fragile peace. Now, the Hives must come to terms with the
legacy of the First Contact War and decide how they are to adapt.
backgroundStory:
Born on the fertile but unstable world known as Arʼkhenos, the Alien
Hives are made up of the species that specialised to survive the
constant cycle of extinction on their world. This cycle would only find
its end as an entity which they came to know as the Mother developed
a way to transmit her memories into the various species of the
Arʼkhenos.
These species lived together in harmony under her guidance for
thousands of years in a period known as the Everbloom.This changed
suddenly when the Mother died; the traumatic details of the event
have largely been lost to time, but before she died, she gave the
species of Arkʼhenos a final gift: seven massive creatures capable of
travelling through space, each bearing one of her genetic offspring.
These space-faring creatures came to be known as Hiveships, and her
offspring were known as the Children.
Hivers travelled throughout the Frontier,seeking a world where one of
the Children could flourish and grow to take the place of their lost
Mother, but with little success. After centuries of failed efforts beyond
the edge of charted space, their hopes were rekindled with the distant
Radiance Cascade, which echoed the Motherʼs dying cries in their
ancestral memories. Many Hiveships set out for the Sirius Sector. Their
arrival set off a series of conflicts with the factions there known as the
First Contact Wars, as communication proved difficult and many
assumed the Hives were hostile because of their alien appearance and
nature. The Hivers soon were locked into a war of extermination with
the various species of Sirius, which only concluded when the DAO
Union discovered a means to communicate.
Peace provided its own challenges for the Alien Hives, as they soon
found themselves confronted with several alien ideas and values that
challenged the structure of their society. They strive to stand on equal
footing with the other species of the Sirius Sector, protect their
migratory routes and defend their seeded worlds. Some in the lower
castes now demand new rights, undermining the harmonious working
of their Hiveships, while certain Hive Lords still wage a long war
against all the species of Sirius, fearing that the corrupting influence of
outsiders might ultimately destroy their way of life completely.
How will your Hive adapt?

armyWideSpecialRule.name: Hive Bond
armyWideSpecialRule.description: Units where all models have this rule get +1 to morale test rolls.

specialRules.name: Agile
specialRules.description: Moves +1" when using Advance, and +2” when using Rush/Charge.

specialRules.name: Breath Attack
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, roll one die. On a 2+ one enemy unit within 6" in line of sight takes 1 hit with Blast(3) and AP(1).

specialRules.name: Caster Group
specialRules.description: Pick one model with this rule in this unit to have Caster(X), where X is the total number of models with this rule in this unit. If the model is killed, pick another to be the new caster, and transfer all spell tokens to it. The caster loses all unspent spell tokens at the end of the round.

specialRules.name: Fortified
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule take hits, those hits count as having AP(-1), to a min. of AP(0).

specialRules.name: Furious Buff
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Furious once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Hit & Run Fighter
specialRules.description: Once per round, units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3" after being in melee.

specialRules.name: Hive Bond Boost
specialRules.description: If all models in this unit have Hive Bond, they get +2 to morale test rolls from Hive Bond (instead of only +1).

specialRules.name: Increased Shooting Range
specialRules.description: This model gets +6" range when shooting.

specialRules.name: Infiltrate
specialRules.description: Counts as having Ambush, but may be deployed up to 1" away from enemy units.

specialRules.name: No Retreat
specialRules.description: When a unit where most models have this rule fails a morale test that causes it to be Shaken or Routed, the test counts as passed instead. Then, roll as many dice as the number of wounds it would take to fully destroy it, and for each result of 1-3 the unit takes one wound, which can't be ignored.

specialRules.name: Piercing Growth
specialRules.description: Place one marker on this unit at the end of each round if it's on the table. For each marker models with this rule in it get AP(+1) (up to a max. of +2). If this unit is ever Shaken, it loses all its markers.

specialRules.name: Piercing Tag
specialRules.description: Once per game, during this model's activation, pick one enemy unit within 36" and in line of sight of it, and place X markers on it. When attacking, friendly units may remove markers from their target before rolling to block to get +AP(Y), where Y is the number of removed markers.

specialRules.name: Precise
specialRules.description: Gets +1 to hit when attacking.

specialRules.name: Precision Debuff
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18", which gets -1 to hit rolls when attacking once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Predator Fighter
specialRules.description: For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit in melee, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesnʼt apply to newly generated attacks.

specialRules.name: Rapid Charge
specialRules.description: This model moves +4" when using Charge actions.

specialRules.name: Ravage
specialRules.description: When it's this model's turn to attack in melee, roll X dice. For each 6+ the target takes one wound.

specialRules.name: Regenerative Strength
specialRules.description: Place one marker on this model when it ignores a wound. When in melee, pick one of its weapons to get +X attacks, where X is the number of markers on it.

specialRules.name: Resistance
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored. If the wounds were from a spell, then they are ignored on a 2+ instead.

specialRules.name: Retaliate
specialRules.description: When this model takes a wound in melee, the attacker takes X hits.

specialRules.name: Rupture
specialRules.description: Ignores Regeneration, and on unmodified results of 6 to hit that aren't blocked, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.

specialRules.name: Self-Destruct
specialRules.description: If this model is killed in melee, the attacking unit takes X hits. If this model survives melee, after both sides have finished attacking, it is immediately killed, and the enemy unit takes X hits.

specialRules.name: Shielded
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule get +1 to defense rolls against hits that are not from spells.

specialRules.name: Shred
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 1 to block hits, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.

specialRules.name: Spawn
specialRules.description: Once per game, when this model is activated, you may place a new unit of X fully within 6" of it.

specialRules.name: Spell Conduit
specialRules.description: Casters within 12" that are from other friendly units may cast spells as if they were in this model's position, and get +1 to casting rolls when doing so.

specialRules.name: Stealth Buff
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Stealth once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Strafing
specialRules.description: Once per activation, when this model moves through enemy units, pick one of them and attack it with this weapon as if it was shooting. This weapon may only be used in this way.

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Surprise Attack
specialRules.description: Counts as having Infiltrate. Once deployed via this rule, roll X dice, for each 4+ one enemy unit within 3” takes 2 hits with AP(1).

specialRules.name: Takedown Strike
specialRules.description: Once per game, when it's this model's turn to attack in melee, you may pick one model in the unit as its target, and make one attack at Quality 2+ with AP(2) and Deadly(3), which is resolved as if it's a unit of 1.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable
specialRules.description: When attacking, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Fighter
specialRules.description: When in melee, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Fighter Mark
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18", which friendly units gets Unpredictable Fighter against once (next time the effect would apply).

auraSpecialRules.name: Furious Aura
auraSpecialRules.description: This model and its unit get Furious.

auraSpecialRules.name: Hive Bond Boost Aura
auraSpecialRules.description: This model and its unit get Hive Bond Boost.

auraSpecialRules.name: Increased Shooting Range Aura
auraSpecialRules.description: This model and its unit get +6" range when shooting.

auraSpecialRules.name: Rapid Charge Aura
auraSpecialRules.description: This model and its unit moves +4" when using Charge actions.

auraSpecialRules.name: Shielded Aura
auraSpecialRules.description: This model and its unit get Shielded.

armySpells.name: Animate Spirit
armySpells.description: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Hit & Run Fighter once (next time the effect would apply).

armySpells.name: Overwhelming Strike
armySpells.description: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Rupture. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

armySpells.name: Infuse Bloodthirst
armySpells.description: Pick up to two friendly units within 12", which get Hive Bond Boost once (next time the effect would apply).

armySpells.name: Psychic Blast
armySpells.description: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 4 hits with AP(2).

armySpells.name: Terror Seeker
armySpells.description: Pick up to three enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Unpredictable Fighter against once (next time the effect would apply).

armySpells.name: Hive Shriek
armySpells.description: Pick one enemy model within 18", which takes 6 hits with AP(1).

upgrades.type: Replace up to two Razor Claws
Replace all Poison Spurts and Toxin Claws

options.name: Acid Spurt
options.details: (12", A2, Blast(3), Bane), Whip Limbs (A8, Bane, Precise)

options.name: Explosive Spit
options.details: (30", A2, AP(2), Blast(6)), Titanic Claws (A6, AP(2), Rupture)

options.name: Devourer Titan
options.details: (Titan Devouring Tongue (18", A3, AP(4), Deadly(3), Takedown), Tough(3))

options.name: Grasping Titan
options.details: (Titan Grasping Tongue (18", A12, Reliable, Bane), Tough(6))
